SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Matthew Pons Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per. Also present is Mrs. Pons.
Rosimeire Harrington is present as an authorized representative for Defendant/Appellant

All parties are sworn.

Rosemary Harrington testifies on behalf of Defendant/Appellant

The Court asks clarifying questions as to any disputes to the amount. Defendant/Appellant has no objections to the amount.

At the close of the hearing, the Court rules as follows:

The Court affirms the judgment.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).
